nasb.text: Now the sons of Israel gave by lot to the Levites these cities with their pasture lands, as the Lord had commanded through Moses.

esv.text: These cities and their pasturelands the people of Israel gave by lot to the Levites, as the Lord had commanded through Moses.

cnv.text: 以色列人照著耶和華吩咐摩西的，藉著抽籤，把這些城市和城的郊野分給利未人。

ccb.text: 以色列人照耶和华对摩西的吩咐，把这些城邑及其草场用抽签的方式分给利未人。
